title: Specific PPE Items Required by Hazard Category
description: Detailed breakdown of required, optional, and excluded PPE items for each arc-flash hazard category 1–4. Used to specify what must be worn for work in each category zone.

rows.ppe_item: AR shirt + pants OR AR coverall (≥4 cal/cm² ATPV min)
AR face shield (clear or tinted, ≥2 mm polycarbonate)
Hard hat (non-melting, Class E per ANSI Z89.1)
Leather gloves (for handling tools + work, ≥0.1 in thick)
Rubber gloves + leather protectors (11 kV rated min, or AR overgloves)
AR overjacket / oversleeves (optional layer, ≥8 cal/cm² ATPV)
Hearing protection (earplugs or earmuffs, ≥25 dB NRR)
Voltage-rated insulated tools (for live work, 600V+ rated)
Arc-rated footwear (≥2 in top height, optional backup)
Class 0 insulated gloves (max 500V, for shock protection)

notes: Items marked 'required' MUST be worn. Items marked 'optional' are recommended or may be required per facility SOP. Items marked 'excluded' must not be worn (e.g., synthetic materials in Category 4 due to arc ignition risk). All AR garments must be labeled with ATPV or Breakopen Arc Thermal Performance (BATP) rating. Hard hats and glasses must meet ANSI standards.
license_note: PPE item requirements derived from NFPA 70E:2024 public standard structure.
